title: Tang Jie personally reveals GLM-5.5: A legendary plus phrase has once again raised the arms race of domestic large models
excerpt: the surge of domestic large models is bringing them closer to the top American closed-source AI models to a point where it's hard to tell the difference. Accord
content_html:
the surge of domestic large models is bringing them closer to the top American closed-source AI models to a point where it's hard to tell the difference. According to Qianzhi, on July 20th, after Qwen and Kimi showcased their strength, it's now Zhizhu's turn. The rumored GLM-5.5 is described as a historic upgrade. This time, it's not media speculation but Zhizhu's founder Tang Jie who has stepped into the spotlight.

A netizen mentioned in comments that both Qwen and Kimi have undergone a historic evolution, and casually asked if there was still hope for GLM. Tang Jie's response immediately raised expectations—he used the term "epic plus." This means that according to Zhizhu's own judgment, the improvement in this generation is even greater than what the netizen mentioned.

Of course, specific numbers are not available yet, but Tang Jie clearly hopes the outside world maintains confidence in GLM. His confidence comes from the achievements of the previous generation: before Kimi K3 was released, GLM-5.2 was the first domestic large model to match the performance level of Opus in AI programming ability. More notably, its scale—GLM-5.2 has only around 74 billion parameters, roughly a quarter of Kimi K3 and about one-fifth or even less than top American AI models—yet it managed to bring its capabilities up to that level through post-training, serving as a prime example of achieving great capabilities with small parameters.

The new model referred to by Tang Jie as "epic plus" is likely the next generation, GLM-5.5. Previously, there were rumors about GLM-5.3, but now it seems GLM-5.5 is more likely, although it's also possible that it might be named GLM-6 at launch. One thing that can be confirmed is that the parameter count of the next generation of large models will at least exceed 1 trillion. Considering that Zhizhu has previously used DeepSeek's open-source base model, it's speculated that GLM-5.5 may reach 1.6 trillion parameters, comparable to V4Pro; combined with Zhizhu's well-known strong post-training capabilities, its performance leap is definitely worth betting on, possibly marking another domestic large model comparable to Fable5 in scale.

However, in the waiting list of the domestic lineup, the most anxious moment right now is the official release of DeepSeek V4. At the time the report was published, it was the last moment of mid-July—the midnight hour was hanging overhead. Whether this little whale would suddenly unveil a big move in the middle of the night or once again delay the release is uncertain. When Zhizhu ignited the topic with an "epic plus," it's clear that the relay race of domestic large models is far from over.

sentences.zh: 考虑到知猪之前已经使用了DeepSeek的开源基础模型，推测GLM-5.5可能达到1.6万亿参数，堪比V4Pro；结合知猪众所周知的强大后期训练能力，其性能飞跃绝对值得押注，可能标志着国内又一个规模堪比《神鬼寓言5》的大型模型。

sentences.zh: 不过，在国内阵容的等待名单中，眼下最焦灼的时刻就是DeepSeek V4的正式发布。

sentences.en: At the time the report was published, it was the last moment of mid-July—the midnight hour was hanging overhead.
sentences.zh: 报告发表时，正值七月中旬的最后一刻——午夜时分悬在头顶上。

sentences.en: Whether this little whale would suddenly unveil a big move in the middle of the night or once again delay the release is uncertain.
sentences.zh: 这条小鲸鱼是会在半夜突然露出大招，还是再次推迟释放，还不得而知。

sentences.en: When Zhizhu ignited the topic with an "epic plus," it's clear that the relay race of domestic large models is far from over.
sentences.zh: 当知竹用一句“史诗加”引爆话题时，显然国产大车型的接力赛还远没有结束。

content_html_zh:
国产大型模型的激增，正让它们与美国顶级闭源AI模型的距离越来越近，甚至到了难以分辨的地步。 据千纸透露，7月20日，在Qwen和Kimi展现了实力之后，现在轮到Zhizhu了。 传闻中的 GLM-5.5 被描述为一次历史性的升级。 这一次，不是媒体炒作，而是知竹创始人唐杰走入了聚光灯下。

有网友在评论中提到Qwen和Kimi都经历了历史性的演变，并随口问GLM还有希望吗？ 唐杰的回应立刻让人期待——他用了“史诗+”这个词。 这意味着，根据智竹自己的判断，这一代的进步甚至比网友所说的还要大。

当然，具体数字目前还无法得知，但唐杰显然希望外界对GLM保持信心。 他的自信来自于上一代的成绩：在Kimi K3发布之前，GLM-5.2是国内首款在AI编程能力上与Opus性能水平相匹配的大型机型。 更值得注意的是，它的规模——GLM-5.2只有约740亿个参数，大约是Kimi K3的四分之一，大约是美国顶级人工智能模型的五分之一甚至更少——但它却通过后期训练将其能力提升到了这个水平，成为用小参数实现大能力的典型例子。

被唐杰称为“epic plus”的新型号很可能是下一代GLM-5.5。 此前有关于 GLM-5.3 的传闻，但现在看来 GLM-5.5 的可能性更大，尽管也有可能在发布时被命名为 GLM-6。 可以确认的一件事是，下一代大型模型的参数数量至少将超过1万亿。 考虑到知猪之前已经使用了DeepSeek的开源基础模型，推测GLM-5.5可能达到1.6万亿参数，堪比V4Pro；结合知猪众所周知的强大后期训练能力，其性能飞跃绝对值得押注，可能标志着国内又一个规模堪比《神鬼寓言5》的大型模型。

不过，在国内阵容的等待名单中，眼下最焦灼的时刻就是DeepSeek V4的正式发布。 报告发表时，正值七月中旬的最后一刻——午夜时分悬在头顶上。 这条小鲸鱼是会在半夜突然露出大招，还是再次推迟释放，还不得而知。 当知竹用一句“史诗加”引爆话题时，显然国产大车型的接力赛还远没有结束。
